title: Fermented Saudi Pappardelle
description: A nostalgic Saudi Arabian dish featuring slow-cooked pappardelle pasta with fermented flavors, perfect for a hearty dinner.

ingredients.name: fermented saffron water
ingredients.notes: made from 10 threads saffron + 200ml water, steeped for 1 hour

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use sea salt for best flavor

instructions: In a pot, combine pappardelle pasta with fermented saffron water, cumin, and paprika. Bring to a gentle simmer.
Add garlic and olive oil, then salt to taste. Cook for 12-15 minutes until pasta is tender.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve hot with a side of lemon wedges for acidity.
